Cinematic still captured on 35mm film showing SCARLETT in a clean white tank top standing barefoot on the wet shoreline, one foot lifted slightly as a gentle wave rushes over her toes and sinks into the sand, body angled toward the ocean with a natural mid-breath posture suggesting laughter, lipstick tube resting beside the embossed brand imprint in the damp sand a few inches from her foot, pale sand stretching toward the open horizon with small shells and linen scraps nearby on a pale board, golden-hour warmth washing across the entire frame with crisp cool shadows carving every texture and grain, bright natural coastal light creating soft bokeh on the receding water, shallow depth of field with the foreground sharply detailed and the distant sea gently blurred, dynamic handheld energy with slight natural movement in the composition.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - Wet shoreline with waves washing over feet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
